label: content
narrative: Section title, four-row test-type table, and インタフェース term definition all match OCR source faithfully. The table rows (単体テスト, 結合テスト, システムテスト, 運用テスト) with their descriptions and responsible parties are transcribed verbatim. The インタフェース definition is a correct distillation of the OCR prose, with no meaning loss. Three figure entities have correct captions. OCR truncation at line 22 ('プログラムとプログ...') is a Mistral known limitation and does not affect the structured entities.
